chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1557 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.7092/2020 2. For hearing of main case 17.09.2025 Mr. Sohail H.K. Rana, advocate for respondent Learned counsel for respondent states that the petition is not maintainable inter alia adequate remedy is available to the petitioner under the law. Be that as it may, petition is pending since 2020 and even five years later learned counsel for the petitioner remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
